steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The key phrase is “they always pointed to the Turkins as the most accomplished and most enlightened family of all.” The inhabitants explicitly single the Turkins out as the premier family—set apart from all others.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: This distinction places the Turkins in a unique position—choice B directly names this status. The other choices either lack textual support (A and D don't match what's described) or assume emotions the passage doesn't express (C claims dislike of the city). That matches choice B — B is correct.
